title: Single-user decode — AWQ vs FP8 · 256K-capable fleet (short-ctx bars)
subtitle: 2x R9700 TP=2, single-user, fp8 KV. Every model here REACHES 256K in AWQ or FP8; 4 bars/model = AWQ no-spec, AWQ+draft, FP8 no-spec, FP8+draft. ⚠ Bars are SHORT-ctx decode (format comparison) — NOT measured at 256K depth.
note: ⚠ DEPTH: these bars are short-ctx. At TRUE 256K decode depth the no-spec numbers are far lower (AWQ no-spec: Coder-30B 14.9, Qwen3.6-MoE 18.6, Qwen3.5 10.3, gemma4-26B 13.6, qwen3vl-32b 8.2 — full table in benchmarks/v0513-resweep-2026-06-16.md) and the +draft bars COLLAPSE to <=~1 tok/s (see benchmarks/spec-at-depth-collapse-2026-06-15.md). The '256K' = the fleet reaches 256K, not the bar depth. 2026-06-01 UPDATE: the three MoE models (Coder-30B, Qwen3.6-35B-A3B, gemma-4-26B) now run cuda-graph ON in BOTH formats, so their no-spec bars were re-measured fairly under graphs — AWQ 56.0/60.2/52.9, FP8 38.3/36.4/41.8 (was 25.6/26.5/31.9 and 14.7/15.0/18.7 eager). 2026-06-08 reconcile to current README tables: DeltaNet-dense 27B rows (Qwen3.5/3.6-27B) stay cuda-graph eager (GPU-bound) but their AWQ no-spec recovered 14.4->25.3 via patch-006 (GEMV batched-load fix — a kernel fix, not a graph; both share one measured curve); Qwen3-VL-32B AWQ no-spec now measured (25.5); Nemotron-Omni (Mamba2 hybrid) is cuda-graph ON 64 (was 29 eager — the whole hybrid is launch-bound at M=1). spec bars NOT re-measured under graph yet. We only care about 256K single-user. This fleet = models with an FP8 variant (so AWQ-vs-FP8 is a real contrast) that reach true single-user 256K in AWQ and/or FP8. Per-model 4 values: awq_nospec / awq_spec / fp8_nospec / fp8_spec (null → rendered '—' = not built / not reachable / no working draft). awq_nospec = freshest measured short-ctx decode from the 2026-05-31 sweep (benchmarks/<slug>/results.json) where a slug exists, else the 2026-05-27 fp8-comparison ref. fp8_nospec = fp8-comparison fp8_toks (2026-05-27 short-ctx ref, not re-measured post-fix). awq_spec = AWQ-production spec-decode (benchmarks/specdecode.json working ships, --speculative-attention-mode decode @ TP2). fp8_spec = FP8-target spec-decode (only Coder-30B EAGLE3 86 + Qwen3.6-35B DFlash 45 reach 256K). Where a model's FP8 caps below 256K (Qwen3-VL-32B ~159K) its fp8 cells are null per 'we only care about 256K'. DROPPED (sub-256K in BOTH formats, weight/native-ctx bound): gemma-4-31B (dense, AWQ ~105K / FP8 ~51K), Coder-Next-80B + Coder-Next-REAM-60B (131K-native), Devstral-2-24B (FP8-only ~180K). Reconciliation: gemma-4-26B AWQ was drifting (README 30 / old fp8-comparison 15) — the 2026-05-31 sweep measures 31.9 short-ctx, used everywhere. Devstral-24B(v1) AWQ no-spec = 10.2 (2026-05-31 sweep, internally consistent with conc=1 TPOT 97ms; supersedes the stale 37 short-ctx ref). FP8+draft @256K works only for Coder-30B EAGLE3 (~86; the EAGLE3 draft is 0.57GB). Qwen3.6-35B FP8+DFlash does NOT reach 256K (verified 2026-06-15; the 2.24GB DFlash draft+verify OOM the 256K pool on 2x32GB — caps ~183K) so its fp8_spec is nulled; AWQ+DFlash reaches 256K (80). Dense/DeltaNet/SWA have no working int4-or-fp8 draft on this box (drafts OOM the VRAM-tight DeltaNet KV, or no published draft).

models.name: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B
models.note: no-spec now cuda-graph ON (2026-06-01): AWQ 56.0 (was 25.6 eager), FP8 38.3 (was 14.7). AWQ+EAGLE3 97; FP8+EAGLE3 86 @256K (361MB draft) — spec not re-measured under graph

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B
models.note: no-spec now cuda-graph ON (2026-06-01): AWQ 60.2 (was 26.5 eager), FP8 36.4 (was 15.0). DeltaNet-MoE state capture is bit-exact. AWQ+DFlash 80 @256K. FP8+DFlash does NOT reach 256K on 2x32GB (VERIFIED 2026-06-15, supersedes the prior '45 @256K' claim): pool sizes to 256822 tok @mem0.92 but the DFlash verify-forward OOMs at runtime (even with PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments — hard 0-bytes-free, not fragmentation); mem0.90 boots clean but caps at a 183449-tok pool (0.04 GB free); mem0.85 gives only 13897. So FP8+DFlash is short/mid-ctx only — short-ctx decode ~68 t/s (accept ~3.3) is healthy. int4 weights are half the size, which is why AWQ+DFlash fits the spec KV + verify activations at full 256K and FP8+DFlash cannot. fp8_spec nulled (chart is 256K-only).

models.name: Qwen3.5-27B
models.note: AWQ no-spec 25.3 @128 (post patch-006 GEMV fix; recovered from the 14.x v0.5.12 regression; the two DeltaNet-27B hybrids share one measured curve). DeltaNet-dense stays cuda-graph eager (GPU-bound). No working draft: z-lab DFlash 3.3GB OOMs DeltaNet, int4-MTP graft accepts ~0

models.name: Qwen3.6-27B
models.note: AWQ no-spec 25.3 @128 (post patch-006 GEMV fix; the re-measured DeltaNet-27B curve, shared with Qwen3.5-27B). DeltaNet-dense stays cuda-graph eager. Same draft block as Qwen3.5-27B

models.name: gemma-4-26B-A4B
models.note: no-spec now cuda-graph ON (2026-06-01): AWQ 52.9 (was 31.9 eager), FP8 41.8 (was 18.7); vision intact under graph. 256K via triton flash. No DFLASH hook; base EAGLE3 accept ~1.34

models.name: Devstral-24B
models.note: AWQ no-spec = 2026-05-31 sweep 10.2 (supersedes stale 37). FP8 par/clean dense 256K win. No published draft

models.name: Qwen3-VL-32B
models.note: AWQ full 256K, no-spec 25.5 @128 (post patch-006 GEMV fix, 64-layer dense 32B). FP8 caps ~159K (<256K) -> NA per 256K-only. VL spec broken #17935

models.name: Nemotron-3-Nano-Omni-30B
models.note: FP8-only (no AWQ build). no-spec now cuda-graph ON (2026-06-01): 64.0 @short (was ~31 eager), 45 @256K. whole Mamba2 hybrid is launch-bound at M=1, captures cleanly. 256K via triton flash. No published/bundled draft (Nano excluded from MTP)

models.name: North-Mini-Code-1.0
models.note: FP8-only on RDNA4 (Ampere can't FP8; the 3090 handed it over). cohere2_moe thinking coder, 500K-native. 256K=33.6 tok/s (short ~60-65), 1.58M-tok KV pool, cuda-graph ON, --context-length 262144 (preset default 131K). No published draft. Re-confirmed serving 2026-06-19.

models.name: Gemma 4 31B
models.note: AWQ 256K only (FP8 caps ~51K, sub-256K → no FP8 bar). 60-layer dense, eager/GPU-bound (cuda-graph ~0). 22.9@short→5.9@256K. No draft; vision crashes (text+thinking).

models.name: Gemma 4 12B
models.note: AWQ 256K (no FP8 build). gemma4_unified FULL OMNI (text+thinking+vision+video). 48-layer dense eager. 33.2@short→9.2@244K. No draft.

models.name: Qwen3-Coder-REAP-25B
models.note: AWQ 256K (REAP-pruned MoE). cuda-graph ON. 56.8@short. FP8/draft n/a here.

models.name: Qwen3.6-VL-REAP-26B
models.note: AWQ 256K (vision). cuda-graph ON. 21.3@short. FP8/draft n/a here.

models.name: GLM-4.5-Air-REAP-82B
models.note: AWQ 256K (REAP-pruned 82B MoE, glm4_moe). 25.6@short. FP8/draft n/a here.

models.name: Devstral-2-24B
models.note: AWQ 256K (was FP8-only ~180K; AWQ reaches full 256K). 41.0@short→15.0@244K. No working draft.
